# ByteSizedSecurity — Full Article Index

> Cybersecurity insights and analysis — investigating cybercrime, security trends, vulnerabilities, and defense strategies.

## Author

Marc David — Senior Security Engineer, ISC2 CISSP
Credentials: https://www.credly.com/users/marcdavid
Site: https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/marccdavid

## About

ByteSizedSecurity is an independent cybersecurity blog covering threat intelligence, privacy, career guidance, and technical deep-dives for security professionals and enthusiasts. Published since 2024 with 37+ articles across 8 topic areas.

## Topic Taxonomy

- Network Security — privacy legislation, encryption policy, credential theft, insider threats
- Vulnerabilities — CVE analysis, data breaches, cloud misconfigurations
- DevSecOps — AI in security, career guidance, automation, future skills
- Web Security — browser extensions, malware delivery, Chrome zero-days
- Blue Team — incident response, identity protection, credit freezes, HIPAA compliance
- Pentesting — tools, ethical hacking, AI-assisted testing
- Cryptography — encryption, secure communications
- Reverse Engineering — malware analysis, binary internals

## Complete Article Index

### 2026

- 2026-05-26: [AI Fuels Cybersecurity Boom: Your Career Guide](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/05/26/ai-fuels-cybersecurity-boom-your-career-guide/)
  AI isn't cutting cybersecurity jobs; it's creating more. How AI generates new threats and opportunities, and what this means for your career.

- 2026-05-17: [Cybersecurity Job Market Broken? Network, Don't Apply](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/05/17/cybersecurity-job-market-broken-network-dont-apply/)
  Why traditional job applications fail in cybersecurity and how strategic networking opens doors.

- 2026-05-13: [Encryption Backdoors: Canada's Bill C-22 Threatens Global Security](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/05/13/encryption-backdoors-canada-bill-c22-threatens-global-security/)
  Canada's Bill C-22 mandates encryption backdoors, user data retention, and sharing with foreign governments. Analysis of legislative threats to end-to-end encryption.

- 2026-05-05: [Utah's VPN Law: A Threat to Internet Privacy](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/05/05/utahs-vpn-law-a-threat-to-internet-privacy/)
  How Utah's legislation targeting VPN usage sets a dangerous precedent for internet privacy.

- 2026-04-12: [Credential Theft: The New Normal in Cyber Attacks](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/04/12/credential-theft-new-normal-cyber-attacks/)
  Nearly one in three cyber intrusions now use valid employee credentials, fueled by AI. Why credential-based attacks dominate the threat landscape.

- 2026-04-12: [AI Simulations: A New Frontier for Cyber Threats](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/04/12/ai-simulations-a-new-frontier-for-cyber-threats/)
  Multi-agent AI simulations can predict human behavior with striking accuracy, opening a new era for adversarial social engineering and disinformation.

- 2026-03-18: [The Ultimate Free Cybersecurity Career Roadmap](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/03/18/okurrrr-ultimate-free-cybersecurity-career-roadmap/)
  Comprehensive free resources and paths into cybersecurity for career changers and beginners.

- 2026-03-06: [LexisNexis Breach: Unpatched App, Leaky IAM, and Your Data](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/03/06/lexisnexis-breach-unpatched-app-leaky-iam-and-your-data/)
  Breakdown of a major data breach caused by an unpatched React app and overly permissive IAM. Their second breach in two years.

- 2026-02-26: [LexisNexis & Credit Freezes: Your Guide to Identity Protection](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/26/lexisnexis-credit-freezes-your-guide-to-identity-protection/)
  How LexisNexis data affects you and why freezing your credit at all three bureaus is crucial for identity theft protection.

- 2026-02-24: [LinkedIn Blue Check: What You Sacrifice for a Badge](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/24/linkedin-blue-check-what-you-sacrifice-for-a-badge/)
  Verifying identity on LinkedIn means handing sensitive data to 17 subprocessors including AI firms, accessible to US law enforcement under the CLOUD Act.

- 2026-02-22: [IDMerit Data Leak: 1 Billion Records Exposed](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/22/idmerit-data-leak-1-billion-records-exposed/)
  Analysis of the IDMerit data leak exposing over 1 billion identity verification records.

- 2026-02-21: [Infostealers: From Passwords to Your Full Identity](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/21/infostealers-from-passwords-to-your-full-identity/)
  How modern infostealers escalate from credential theft to full identity compromise.

- 2026-02-18: [Navigating the Broken Cybersecurity Job Market](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/18/navigating-the-broken-cybersecurity-job-market/)
  Strategies for breaking into cybersecurity despite gatekeeping and unrealistic job requirements.

- 2026-02-17: [Ring Backtracks: Super Bowl Ad Sparks Privacy Pushback](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/17/ring-backtracks-super-bowl-ad-sparks-privacy-pushback/)
  Amazon Ring ends a surveillance partnership after public outcry. Growing consumer resistance to pervasive camera networks and AI tracking.

- 2026-02-17: [Chrome First 2026 Zero-Day: Update Now](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/17/chrome-first-2026-zero-day-update-now/)
  Technical analysis of Chrome's first zero-day vulnerability of 2026 and immediate mitigation steps.

- 2026-02-17: [287 Chrome Extensions Caught Spying on 37M Users](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/17/287-chrome-extensions-caught-spying-37m-users-what-to-do/)
  Investigation into malicious browser extensions harvesting data from 37 million users and how to protect yourself.

- 2026-02-16: [2FA: The 5-Minute Fix That Stops 99% of Account Attacks](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/16/2fa-the-5-minute-fix-that-stops-99-percent-of-account-attacks/)
  Practical guide to enabling two-factor authentication. How 2FA stops over 99% of automated attacks.

- 2026-02-16: [Cybersecurity Hiring: Portfolios Trump Pedigree Now](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/16/cybersecurity-hiring-portfolios-trump-pedigree-now/)
  New data reveals side projects, GitHub, and internships are key for cybersecurity jobs over traditional credentials.

- 2026-02-16: [CISA ChatGPT Incident: The Shadow AI Problem](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/16/cisa-chatgpt-incident-shadow-ai-problem/)
  How unauthorized AI tool usage at CISA highlights the growing shadow AI problem in organizations.

- 2026-02-15: [Browser Extensions: Are They Spying On You?](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/15/browser-extensions-are-they-spying-on-you/)
  Many browser extensions secretly harvest your data for profit. How to audit and protect your digital privacy.

- 2026-02-14: [AI's Crossroads: Ads vs. Ethics — What's Next?](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/14/ais-crossroads-ads-vs-ethics-whats-next/)
  The tension between AI monetization through advertising and ethical AI development.

- 2026-01-20: [Fake Chrome Extensions Hijack HR Platforms: Is Your Org at Risk?](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/01/20/fake-chrome-extensions-hijack-hr-platforms-is-your-org-at-risk/)
  A new campaign used fake productivity tools to steal login tokens from major HR platforms.

- 2026-01-07: [Future-Proof Your IT Career: Skills for 2026 & Beyond](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/01/07/future-proof-it-career-skills-2026/)
  Essential skills and strategies to stand out in IT/security in 2026, including embracing AI and strategic niche specialization.

- 2026-01-03: [America's Cybersecurity Crisis: 40% Defender Shortage](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/01/03/americas-cybersecurity-crisis-40-percent-defender-shortage/)
  A staggering 40% of America's cyber defenders are missing, impacting threat intelligence, incident response, and supply chain security.

### 2025

- 2025-12-31: [NeuroSploit v2: AI Reimagines Penetration Testing](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2025/12/31/neosploit-v2-ai-reimagines-penetration-testing/)
  How AI-powered penetration testing tools are changing the offensive security landscape.

- 2025-12-26: [HIPAA Security Rule: Hospitals Face Impossible Deadlines](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2025/12/26/hipaa-security-rule-hospitals-face-impossible-deadlines/)
  The new HIPAA Security Rule demands drastic changes in 180 days. Healthcare systems call these timelines unrealistic and dangerous.

- 2025-12-26: [GPT 'Skills' Are Coming: Revolutionize Your Workflow](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2025/12/26/gpt-skills-are-coming-revolutionize-your-workflow/)
  Custom GPTs getting 'Skills' for reusable workflows and automated tasks — the shift from prompt engineering to productivity engineering.

- 2025-12-25: [Stop Patching Manually: Automate Your Vulnerability Management](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2025/12/25/stop-patching-manually-automate-vulnerability-management/)
  Why manual patching doesn't scale and how to build automated vulnerability management pipelines.

- 2025-12-24: [Shocked by Your Digital Footprint? Take It Back Now](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2025/12/24/shocked-by-your-digital-footprint-take-it-back-now/)
  Search your name online and see what strangers find. How to reclaim your privacy with simple steps.

- 2025-12-24: [CrowdStrike Leak: The Human Element of Cybersecurity](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2025/12/24/crowdstrike-leak-human-element-cybersecurity/)
  A major cybersecurity firm breached from the inside — proving your defense is only as strong as your people.

- 2025-12-24: [Boost Your Privacy: Small Steps, Big Impact](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2025/12/24/boost-your-privacy-small-steps-big-impact/)
  How small daily actions like deleting old accounts and disabling location tracking significantly improve your digital privacy.

- 2025-12-24: [22M Aflac Customers Hit in Massive Data Breach](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2025/12/24/22m-aflac-customers-hit-in-massive-data-breach/)
  Analysis of the Aflac data breach affecting 22 million customers.

- 2024-05-14: [Understanding Zero Trust Architecture: A Deep Dive](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2024/05/14/understanding-zero-trust-architecture/)

  Essential tools every ethical hacker needs — from network scanners to exploitation frameworks.

- 2024-05-10: [Analyzing the Log4j Vulnerability](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2024/05/10/analyzing-log4j-vulnerability/)
  Technical analysis of CVE-2021-44228 (Log4Shell) and its widespread impact.

- 2024-05-08: [Secure SSH Keys](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2024/05/08/secure-ssh-keys/)
